finalize.template: Finalize the ongoing work. First inspect the git branch state. If the current branch is a working branch rather than `main`, use `main` as the comparison target anywhere the review/finalization flow needs a base branch or diff target. Then use these skills as part of the finalization flow: `hexarch`, `simplify`, and `coderabbit`. After those skills identify required follow-up work, execute that work rather than stopping at review output. Keep going until the finalization pass is complete, then summarize findings, changes made, remaining risks, and any next steps.
